# `listener` stanza

The `listener` stanza configures the addresses and ports on which Boundary will
respond to requests. At this time, there are two listener types:
[TCP listener](/boundary/docs/monitor/listeners/tcp) and [Unix listener](/boundary/docs/monitor/listeners/unix).


## `listener` purpose

@include '/configuration-reference/listeners/listener-purpose.mdx'
